violations.text: A rodent carcass was observed under the cashier station. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a rodent carcass, rodent droppings in the back office connected to the kitchen area, and throughout the shelving in the front service area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The outside dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The outside dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The storage cabinets has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pest activity to be monitored before opening and throughout the day. Further cleaning, monitoring, and reporting to be recorded when needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The outside dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The floors and the storage cabinets in the front service area and under the dry storage shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pest activity to be monitored before opening and throughout the day. Further cleaning, monitoring, and reporting to be recorded when needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The outside dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The floors in the front service area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pest activity to be monitored before opening and throughout the day. Further cleaning, monitoring, and reporting to be recorded when needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
Food was observed in contact with rodent droppings. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Thorough cleaning and sanitization of the food/non-food contact surfaces and facilities to be preformed daily. Pest activity to be monitored before opening and throughout the day. Further cleaning, monitoring, and reporting to be recorded when needed. Per PIC, pest control visits to occur weekly until rodent activity is resolved. All possible entry ways to be sealed with foam and steel wool to prevent rodent activity. PIC to continue to send pest control reports to inspector after every visit. Plan of action to be sent to inspector by 2pm 3/29/24. Failure to comply with any of the following mentioned may result in further disciplinary action. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

he outside dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The floors under the shelving, ware-washing area, back storage area and throughout the physical facilities in the has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Thorough cleaning and sanitization of the food/non-food contact surfaces and facilities to be preformed daily. Pest activity to be monitored before opening and throughout the day. Further cleaning, monitoring, and reporting to be recorded when needed. Per PIC, pest control visits to occur weekly until rodent activity is resolved. All possible entry ways to be sealed with foam and steel wool to prevent rodent activity. Pest report reviewed at the time of inspection. PIC to send pest control reports to inspector after every visit. Failure to comply with any of the following mentioned may result in further disciplinary action. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floors under the shelving, ware-washing area and back storage area and throughout the physical facilities in the has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to continue to cleaning schedule for staff to ensure that the droppings/rodent activity is cleaned and monitored daily. Per PIC's plan of action, pest control is to increase bi-weekly until rodent activity is resolved. Pest report reviewed at the time of inspection. PIC to send pest control reports to inspector after every visit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floors under the shelving, warewashing area and back storage area in the has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to implement a cleaning schedule for staff to ensure that the droppings/rodent activity is cleaned and monitored daily. Pest control recommended to increase biweekly until pest activity is resolved. PIC to send Plan of Action for cleaning/sanitization/pest control services to inspector by 2/19/24. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Employee clothing and aprons used during service were observed near/with rodent droppings in the office area. Clean equipment and multiuse utensils which have been cleaned and sanitized, laundered linens, and single-service and single-use articles can become contaminated before their intended use in a variety of ways such as through water leakage, pest infestation, or other insanitary condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The outside dumpsters were observed with an accumulation of debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items and clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floors under the shelving and warewashing area in the back kitchen/prep area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

An employee's apron was observed stored on the dry storage racks with food items. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the back kitchen area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of litter, food debris, and other debris. Refuse/dumpster areas must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
